title: Coal India Ltd CIL Management Trainee Online Form 2026 for 660 Post
description: CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026: 660 Vacancies – Online Application Form Started Post Update Date: 06-05-2026 Short Description : Coal India Limited has released a notification for the CIL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026, with a total of 660 vacancies. Candidates must have a Degree in B.Sc / BE / B.tech / MCA / CS from any recognized university , with a maximum age limit of 30 years.
